title: imagebuildah: add AdditionalTags
body: Add an AdditionalTags field to the imagebuildah options structure, to provide for additional tags which we'll want to apply to the image that we're writing.

comments.body: Added some context to the error message returned if we get an error from SetNames().
Removed a redundant type assertion that @TomSweeneyRedHat spotted out of band.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/4d155b93b47e4fde6977229f0ea872a4afcbc34f.1494267067888734976/index.html)
